metadata.name: Detect and Report Accident Blocking Bus Lane

description: An operator must identify a vehicle accident blocking a dedicated bus lane and alert transit operations.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert from camera analytics identifying a 'stopped vehicle' in the 'Market Street' bus-only lane.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the automated traffic anomaly alert.

nodes.task_description: Verify the incident with the live camera feed, confirming it is a two-car accident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent visually confirms the cause of the blockage.

nodes.task_description: Notify the public transit operations center of the blockage so they can begin rerouting buses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the transit team.
